description_long: This object is a detailed model of a classic steam locomotive displayed on a polished wooden base with embedded railway tracks. The locomotive features a cylindrical boiler, a prominent smokestack, and a cab at the rear, all rendered in a glossy black finish. The tender, attached behind the engine, is also black and appears to be designed for carrying coal or water. The wooden base is rectangular with a rich, reddish-brown wood grain, providing a strong contrast to the dark metallic train. The tracks are mounted on top of the base and are visibly raised, with rails and ties clearly defined. There are no visible doors or windows on the locomotive, and the model is compact, likely intended as a display or collectible piece.
description: A glossy black steam locomotive with a tender sits atop a polished, reddish-brown wooden base with embedded railway tracks. The model is detailed, compact, and lacks visible doors or windows.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the black steam locomotive and tender on the wooden base, with clear visibility of the tracks and train details.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the cylindrical boiler, smokestack, and the narrow width of the train, with the tracks leading directly toward the viewer.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the length of the locomotive and tender, with the same track and base details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the tender and the end of the tracks, with the wooden base extending forward.
